untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle is a complex multi-week chart pattern requiring pattern recognition of U-shaped formations with specific geometric properties (cup depth 12-50%, cup duration 7-65 weeks, handle presence). This cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and technical indicators. Pattern detection requires visual/shape analysis or specialized pattern libraries not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using 30% prior uptrend (returns >= 0.30) and price above SMA_20 as proxy for cup formation breakout. Exit uses SMA_20 crossbelow as reversal signal per rule 8. However, the core pattern definition (cup geometry, handle structure, duration, depth constraints) cannot be operationalized with allowed indicators. A full implementation would require a dedicated cup-pattern detection function or custom shape-matching logic.
